title: The Silent Signal
description: Kiriko Vale's Signal Tower has been dark for years — the village fell off every map, and no startup ships from a place the internet forgot. Mira Vale suspects a programmer with a good lantern might be exactly the fix.

steps.title: Find your feet
steps.hint: Mira Vale waits by the dark Signal Tower at the plaza's heart.

steps.title: Gather wild fiber
steps.hint: Pale tufts grow along the eastern road toward Whispergrass Valley. Three strands braid into a respectable patch cable.

steps.title: Weave a Signal Lens
steps.hint: Use the crafting pavilion — the open workbench east of the plaza. You'll also need two smooth stones for the housing.

steps.title: A bug in the line
steps.hint: Your lantern keeps flagging something small and distressed along the old fiber route in the Whispergrass meadow.

steps.title: Recover Piproot's seeds
steps.hint: Three glowing seeds lie scattered in the deep grass near Piproot.

steps.title: Return to Piproot
steps.hint: Close the little Echo's issue: bring its seeds home.

steps.title: Bring the tower online
steps.hint: Mount your Signal Lens in the tower's cradle. Deploy gently.

steps.title: Show Mira the uptime
steps.hint: She'll want to see the beam with her own eyes.

objectives.label: Tell Mira the signal is live
